topics: Identification of cables, wires, switches, fuses, fuse carriers, ELCB, and MCCB
Wiring of a simple light circuit for light/fan point (PVC conduit wiring) and a 6A plug socket with individual control
Wiring of a light/fan circuit using two-way switches (Staircase wiring)
Wiring of a fluorescent lamp and a power plug (16A) socket with a control switch
Wiring of a power distribution arrangement using a single phase MCB distribution board with ELCB, main switch, and energy meter
Familiarisation of step-up and step-down transformers; measurement and representation of voltage and waveform using CRO
Familiarisation of rheostats; measurement of potential across resistance elements using a DC circuit
Identification of battery specifications (Lead acid, Li-Ion, NiCd); familiarisation of earthing schemes (Pipe, Plate, Mat) and ground enhancing materials

Identification of electronic components with specifications (Active, Passive, Electrical, Electronic, Electro-mechanical, Wires, Cables, Connectors, Fuses, Switches, Relays, Crystals, Displays, Fasteners, Heat sinks)
Drawing of electronic circuit diagrams using BIS/IEEE symbols and interpretation of data sheets of discrete components and ICs

Familiarisation and application of testing instruments and commonly used tools (Multimeter, Function generator, Power supply, DSO, Soldering iron, Desoldering pump, Pliers, Cutters, Wire strippers, Screw drivers, Tweezers, Crimping tool, Hot air soldering and de-soldering station)
Testing of electronic components using multimeter (Resistor, Capacitor, Diode, Transistor, JFET)
Printed circuit boards (PCB) - types, single sided, double sided, processing methods; design and fabrication of a single-sided PCB for a simple circuit
Inter-connection methods and soldering practice (Breadboard, Wrapping, Crimping, Soldering - types, selection of materials and safety precautions)
Assembling of electronic circuit/system on general purpose PCB, test and demonstration of functioning (Fixed voltage power supply, Square wave generation using IC 555 timer)
Assembling of electronic circuits using SMT (Surface Mount Technology) stations
Introduction to EDA tools (such as KiCad or XCircuit)
